message:
perf(freeze): optimize _tsc shard compilation and codegen (~1.2x speedup)

Four optimizations to reduce frozen shard overhead:

1. Use frozen_optimize (ReleaseFast) for shard compilation instead of
   hardcoded ReleaseSmall, enabling LLVM to inline CV helper functions
   across the 900K+ fromJSValue/toJSValue calls in generated code.

2. Add primitive fast path for get_loc_check - skip the full
   CV→JSValue→dup→JSValue→CV round-trip for non-reference types
   (int, float, bool, null, undefined) which are the majority in TSC.

3. Right-size stack arrays using actual stack_size from bytecode metadata
   instead of hardcoded 256-element minimum. Most functions need <32 slots.

4. Extract exception cleanup into noinline runtime helper
   (zig_runtime.cleanupLocals) instead of inlining collect-then-free
   loop at every exception site, reducing code size for better icache.

Measured: ~16s → ~13.3s on _tsc test (1.20x improvement).
